round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent successfully integrated the regulatory evidence (yellow lines) to lower confidence in Sweden and solidify Finland.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent successfully integrated the regulatory evidence to differentiate Finland from Sweden, despite identical botanical profiles.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent maintained high confidence and correctly synthesized landscape/botanical context to rule out Russia.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent successfully integrated regulatory evidence to rule out Sweden based on the absence of specific delineator posts.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the double yellow center lines as the decisive evidence, effectively ruling out Sweden and Norway. The synthesis logically combined the landscape/botanical evidence (which pointed to a broad Fennoscandian region) with the specific regulatory marker to pinpoint Finland.
